conditional: Liverpool rejected the offer, valuing the player higher than the proposed fee.
headline: Liverpool reject Inter's €25m bid for Curtis Jones
body: Liverpool instantly rejected Inter's verbal proposal of a €25m package for Curtis Jones, valuing the player higher.
text:
🚨⚫️🔵 Inter verbal proposal for Curtis Jones: €25m package, instantly rejected by Liverpool.
#LFC value Jones at higher price and deal not progressing at current conditions.
